summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Hero section redesign, Global Sidebar Layout, and Dashboard UX polish features. All 9 requested features verified working with 100% pass rate.

minor.issue: Returns 500 if valuation result is missing required fields (multiple_used, base_multiple, arr_used). Only affects test data created without proper schema.

passed_tests: Hero section displays correctly with 'Know Your Value. Build Your Exit.' headline - VERIFIED
V Logo is 64x64 in navbar (md size, Peec.ai style) - VERIFIED
Dashboard mockup visible in hero section with $2.4M valuation preview - VERIFIED
Global sidebar appears after user logs in via Google OAuth - VERIFIED
Sidebar has: Dashboard, New Valuation, Exit OS nav items - VERIFIED
Exit OS nav item has 'NEW' badge - VERIFIED
Sidebar can collapse/expand using toggle button - VERIFIED
Dashboard skeleton loading state shows while data loads - VERIFIED
Dashboard tooltips appear on hover for key metrics (Current Valuation tooltip: 'Your estimated enterprise value based on revenue multiple and growth metrics.') - VERIFIED
ProjectCard has hover states with visible delete button (opacity-based, appears on hover) - VERIFIED
App layout wrapper (data-testid='app-layout') present for protected routes - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testids properly implemented for testing
Protected routes properly wrap AppLayout component in App.js
Tooltip implementation uses Radix UI with proper TooltipProvider at Dashboard level
Skeleton loading state implemented using Shadcn Skeleton component
VLogo component uses 'sm' size (44x44) in sidebar, 'md' size (64x64) in navbar
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users with proper valuation schema
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Hero section, Sidebar, and Dashboard UX features are working. Key test selectors: hero-section, hero-cta-primary, v-logo, sidebar, sidebar-toggle, sidebar-dashboard, sidebar-new-valuation, sidebar-exit-os, app-layout, dashboard-loading (skeleton), exit-snapshot-card, current-valuation, project-card-{id}. Skeleton loading state captured on initial page load before networkidle. Tooltips work via Radix UI - hover on help icons triggers role='tooltip' elements.
